title: Hot Wheels Model Car Kits
summary: A Model Car Kit is a toy car, usually in 1:32, 1:25 & 1:24 scale that needs to be assembled, glued, painted, and put together to have a finished custom car. Hot Wheels has released many kits for many years under different Model Kit companies such as AMT, Polar Lights, Snaps, Revell, and many more listed below.

title: Voodoo Highway 3-Car Set
summary:
750px
To custom car fanatics "cruisin" has become a weekly routine, but to the practitioners of the mystical and magical the ritual goes far beyond a Friday night spin to the hot dog stand. To the tricksters of Voodoo Highway, driving around like a zombie in anything less than the coolest of custom cars is an insult to the spirits of the two-lane asphalt....

title: Lowrider Magazine 3-Car Set
summary:
500px
The lowrider phenomenon originated in the barrios of Southern California during the late 1940's. This unique folk art quickly spread throughout the communities of the Southwest and into the northern cities of Chicago and Detroit, where it gained national attention and popularity. Lowriders are not about speed and muscle, but style and beauty.
